Package io.github.natanimn.telebof.types.updates

Class Update

java.lang.Object
io.github.natanimn.telebof.types.updates.Update
All Implemented Interfaces:
TelegramUpdate
public class Update extends Object implements TelegramUpdate
This class represents an incoming update. At most one of the optional parameters can be present in any given update.
Since:
3 March 2025
